overrides.description: Retain every qualified Release 1215 layer, assign Release 1216, and load focused ritual resonance
Add bell, candle, black-book, mirror, ceremony-state, hot-bell cooling, and persistent ritual behavior

preserved_canonical_state: XB remains the canonical active bell interval
XC remains the canonical paired-candle response state
LLD-FLAG changes only through the original black-book prayer completion
BELL and HOT-BELL still exchange through LLD-ROOM and I-XBH
CANDLES still use the original burn timer and may be lost through canonical misuse
GHOSTS are removed only by the original completed ceremony
the original exorcism order remains bell, lit carried candles, then reading the black book
excluded_scope: Hidden Glade and character alternate ports
